perplexity.answer:
**Andi Partovi** is the **Co-Founder** of **Veris AI**, an infrastructure AI company that builds high-fidelity simulation environments for training and testing enterprise AI agents [1][6][8].

### Key Details

| Attribute | Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Current Role** | **Co-Founder** (also identified as **CTO** in a talk) [1][10] |
| **Company** | **Veris AI** (emerged from stealth in mid-2025) [1][2] |
| **Location** | San Francisco, California, United States [1] |
| **Previous Role** | **Generative AI Solution Architect** at **Google** (3 years) [1][8] |
| **Education** | **Ph.D. in Computer Science** from the **University of Melbourne** [8] |
| **Funding** | Veris AI raised **$8.5M in seed funding** from Decibel Partners, Acrew Capital, and others [2] |

### Additional Information Requested

*   **GitHub Username:** Not publicly listed in the provided search results.
*   **arXiv Papers:** No arXiv papers are mentioned in the search results, though he holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science [8].
*   **Hacker News / Show HN:** No mentions found in the provided search results.
*   **Other Mentions:**
    *   He was a speaker at **QCon San Francisco 2025** on the topic of making AI agents world-ready [8].
    *   He presented at **AI Dev 26 x SF**, discussing why every agent needs a simulation environment [10].
    *   He is a **Fellow of ODF24** (Open Data Fellowship) [1].

Andi Partovi co-founded Veris AI with **Mehdi Jamei** earlier in 2025, focusing on the problem that simulation environments are the only way to systematically train task-specific AI agents [2][7].

github.bio: Andi Partovi is an entrepreneur and data scientist. He cofounded KeyLead Health, a digital health data nalytics company in 2019
